prestazioni: Engine: M30/60 (930/60) 3.3L flat-six with a custom-built 83mm forged crankshaft (Mahle) and 70.4mm forged pistons (JE Pistons) for a stroked displacement of 3.6L, paired with a billet aluminum connecting rod set (Carrillo) and ARP L19 head studs for 12.5:1 compression.

Turbocharger: Garrett GTX4202R Gen II with a 76mm compressor wheel and 64mm turbine wheel, custom 3.5" V-band downpipe (Fabspeed), and a TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate with a 38mm port for precise boost control (targeting 1.8 bar peak pressure).

Fuel & Ignition: Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump with dual Walbro 450LPH in-tank pumps, ID1000x injectors (Injector Dynamics), and a Motec M150 ECU with a custom 930-specific calibration map, paired with MSD 6AL-2 ignition amplifier and NGK R7437-9 racing spark plugs gapped at 0.024".
estetica: Body Kit: RWB (Rauh-Welt Begriff) "Kawasaki" widebody conversion with custom 3M 4090 gloss black vinyl over the original Guards Red paint, including extended fenders, custom front splitter, and a ducktail spoiler with carbon fiber reinforcement (Seibon).

Wheels: BBS RS 010 9x16" (front) and 11x16" (rear) with custom offsets (+15mm front, +25mm rear) and Toyo R888R 225/50R16 (front) and 285/40R16 (rear) tires, paired with Porsche 930 Turbo-spec 4-piston front and rear calipers with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads.

Interior: Full Recaro SRD Evo II carbon fiber bucket seats with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, a custom roll cage (Autopower) with integrated fire suppression system (Sparco), and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel with a quick-release hub, all wrapped in Alcantara (Egger-Green) with red contrast stitching.
